text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka has grown increasingly fatigued. I
bring her to the infirmary so she can rest and
recuperate.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I suppose I should rest for the day.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Zzz... zzz...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Where am I?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I don't know why, but it's so pleasant here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooosh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The air feels nice.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The way the grass sways across the plains... It's
like a large, green ocean.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe! It makes me want to run...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The sky... Why is it so close?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Am... am I flying?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No. I'm running in the air!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this is amazing. All right, I'm aiming for the
sun...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Go!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Mmm...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where'd the sun go?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Was it a... dream?
choice_data_list: A dream? Tell me about it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... Well, there was field of grass that went on
as far as the eye could see.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So, I started running and then, all of a sudden, I
found myself running in mid-air...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Actually... forget I said anything. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A well-recovered Silence Suzuka beams with
renewed enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Am I... running through the sky?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Amazing! It's like I could reach out and
touch the stars!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Screeee...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
What was that sound? I feel like I've heard it
before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BANG! Crackle, crackle, crackle...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What?! Fireworks?! No way!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So beautiful... But, oh no!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Screeee...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: They're going to hit me!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Where am I?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Yes. At first it was a very nice dream, but
then suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I can still hear the fireworks popping in my
head.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It must have been quite the nightmare, because it
seems Silence Suzuka didn't manage to get the
rest she needs.
